---
title: "Project Status"
---

::: {.callout-note}
Generated by `scripts/generate-project-status.py` on 2026-06-15T08:40:18.903136.
:::

## Current milestone

mipvu-workflow-implemented-annotation-pending

## Case status

| Case | Status | Current stage | Manifest docs | Raw | Text | Segmented | MIPVU | Annotated | Concordance | Analysis |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| `am-rev` | corpus-ready | annotation-pending | 9 | 9 | 9 | 9 | 0 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `hitler` | corpus-ready | annotation-pending | 8 | 8 | 8 | 8 | 0 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `lincoln` | mipvu-in-review | pilot-mipvu-reviewed | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `napoleon` | corpus-ready | annotation-pending | 10 | 10 | 10 | 10 | 0 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `x-case` | draft | annotation-dependent-synthesis |  |  |  |  |  |  | draft | draft |

## Notes

Four case corpora are rights-reviewed, acquired, normalized, segmented, verified, and JSON-valid. Strict MIPVU tooling is implemented; Lincoln worklists have been generated and await lexical-unit decisions. Annotation and promotion of public findings remain before v1.
